description_long: This object is a fantastical knife or sword with a long, tapering blade that is predominantly green and covered in a subtle, mottled pattern. One side of the blade features a row of prominent, rounded purple nodules or studs running from the base to the tip, giving it a striking and unusual appearance. The blade is straight and narrows to a sharp point, with no visible edge serration or curvature. The handle is not distinctly separated from the blade, suggesting a monolithic or integrated design, and there is no visible guard. The surface appears to be semi-glossy and hard, likely mimicking a stylized organic or fantasy material. This object would stand out in an urban environment due to its vibrant colors and unique, almost alien design.
description: A long, green, pointed knife or sword with purple nodules along one side and a smooth, integrated handle. The design is fantastical and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile and the row of purple nodules along the edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full length, green coloration, and the blade's tapering shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and the purple nodules.
description_view_3: Back view showing the green surface with the full row of purple nodules prominently visible.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, pointed, with decorative nodules
attribute_handle_design: integrated, straight, same material and color as blade, no distinct grip
attribute_ornamentation: row of purple nodules along one side
